headline: How Project Elevate Is Driving 3% Comp Lifts for Dollar General Stores
summary: DG's Project Elevate drives 3% comp gains by upgrading up to 80% of stores with layout and merchandising tweaks, boosting spend without full remodel costs.

raw.headline: How Project Elevate Is Driving 3% Comp Lifts for Dollar General Stores
raw.summary: DG's Project Elevate drives 3% comp gains by upgrading up to 80% of stores with layout and merchandising tweaks, boosting spend without full remodel costs.

headline: Costco's Warehouse Expansion Plans Signal Long-Term Growth Engine
summary: Costco's plan to open 28 warehouses in FY26 and more than 30 annually highlights its push to fuel growth through expansion and rising traffic.

raw.headline: Costco's Warehouse Expansion Plans Signal Long-Term Growth Engine
